title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.5 — widen rolled to ALL modules: COMPRESS + AMBER now use the same tight 6/6 grid as GRIT, so every module's tiles fill their panel width. DSP untouched. Remaining to fully match the mockup: GRIT SPEED/CAL/BIAS/AGE/LFO -> TWEAK, AMBER stage labels -> vertical side-tags, top-down GR meter, raise the bottom section (summing/limiter/meter) up under COMPRESS/GRIT.
